PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Margaret Farley for Charles Gardiner.

The Court stated that it read the papers and that there seems to be no dispute among anyone concerning admission of the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for March 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
